en: A PRAYER OF DAVID.Hear a just cause, O LORD; attend to my cry! Give ear to my prayer from lips free of deceit!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你垂聽我公義的案件， 傾聽我的申訴； 求你留心聽我的禱告， 這不是出於詭詐嘴唇的禱告。

en: From your presence let my vindication come! Let your eyes behold the right!
zh: 願我的判詞從你面前發出， 願你的眼睛察看正直的事。

en: You have tried my heart, you have visited me by night, you have tested me, and you will find nothing; I have purposed that my mouth will not transgress.
zh: 你試驗了我的心，在夜間鑒察了我； 你熬煉了我，還是找不到甚麼， 因為我立志使我的口沒有過犯。

en: With regard to the works of man, by the word of your lips I have avoided the ways of the violent.
zh: 至於世人的行為， 我藉著你嘴唇所出的話，保護了自己， 不行強暴人的道路。

en: My steps have held fast to your paths; my feet have not slipped.
zh: 我的腳步穩踏在你的路徑上， 我的兩腳沒有動搖。

en: I call upon you, for you will answer me, O God; incline your ear to me; hear my words.
zh: 神啊！我向你呼求，因為你必應允我； 求你側耳聽我，垂聽我的禱告。

en: Wondrously show your steadfast love, O Savior of those who seek refuge from their adversaries at your right hand.
zh: 求你把你的慈愛奇妙地彰顯， 用右手拯救那些投靠你的， 脫離那些起來攻擊他們的。

en: Keep me as the apple of your eye; hide me in the shadow of your wings,
zh: 求你保護我，像保護眼中的瞳人， 把我隱藏在你的翅膀蔭下；

en: from the wicked who do me violence, my deadly enemies who surround me.
zh: 使我脫離那些欺壓我的惡人， 脫離那些圍繞我的死敵。

en: They close their hearts to pity; with their mouths they speak arrogantly.
zh: 他們閉塞了憐憫的心 ， 口裡說出驕傲的話。

en: They have now surrounded our steps; they set their eyes to cast us to the ground.
zh: 他們追蹤我，現在把我圍困了 ； 他們瞪著眼，要把我推倒在地上。

en: He is like a lion eager to tear, as a young lion lurking in ambush.
zh: 他們像急於撕碎獵物的獅子， 又像蹲伏在隱密處的幼獅。

en: Arise, O LORD! Confront him, subdue him! Deliver my soul from the wicked by your sword,
zh: 耶和華啊！求你起來，迎面攻擊他們，把他們打倒； 用你的刀救我的命脫離惡人。

en: from men by your hand, O LORD, from men of the world whose portion is in this life. You fill their womb with treasure; they are satisfied with children, and they leave their abundance to their infants.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你用手救我脫離世人， 脫離那些只在今生有分的世人。 求你用你為他們儲存的充滿他們的肚腹， 使他們的兒女都可以飽嘗， 他們還有剩餘的留給他們的子孫。

en: As for me, I shall behold your face in righteousness; when I awake, I shall be satisfied with your likeness.
zh: 至於我，我必在義中得見你的面； 我醒來的時候， 得見你的形象就心滿意足。
